title: helichrysum keilii
intro: Helichrysum keilii is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, known for its bright yellow flowers and potential medicinal properties. The plant is native to South Africa and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum keilii include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum keilii, including essential oils and tinctures, are often used to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
